⚠ ADVERSARIAL CSS IS ACTIVE — Charts inside shadow DOM should be unaffected (correct fonts, colors, and layout). If charts look broken, isolation is not working.

Immediate Loading - Bandwidth Test

1. Immediate Loading Tests

All charts load immediately when page loads. Full JavaScript bundle downloaded right away.
